placeholders.description: Enter a detailed description of the transaction

tooltips.transactionType: Select the type of transaction: expense, income, or savings
tooltips.sum: Enter a positive amount. Decimals are allowed (e.g., 99.99)
tooltips.currency: Select the currency for this transaction
tooltips.category: Enter a new category or select from existing categories
tooltips.description: A detailed description will help you track the transaction in the future

messages.noCostsFound: No costs found for this month.
messages.noExpensesFound: No expenses found for this category
messages.noCategoriesYet: No categories yet. Add your first category!
messages.createBudget: Create a budget to track your spending
messages.noDataFound: No data found for the selected date range
messages.pleaseSelectColumn: Please select at least one column
messages.thisCategoryUsed: This category is used in expenses and cannot be deleted. You can only delete categories created in this page.
messages.areYouSure: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
messages.connectPartnerToAssign: Connect a partner to use shared payments and splits.
messages.invalidCostDate: Please enter a valid date (year, month, day).
messages.deleteCostConfirm: Delete this transaction? This cannot be undone.
messages.savingsEditNote: Amount and category still apply; savings type tags are kept on save.

charts.clickGetChart: Click "Get Chart" to generate a pie chart for the selected month and year.

budget.title: Budget Management
budget.deleteBudgetConfirm: Delete this budget? This cannot be undone.
budget.spentBasisLabel: What spending counts toward this budget
budget.spentBasisPersonal: Personal (your share of shared expenses, like the report)
budget.spentBasisCoupleShared: Couple — shared expenses only (full amount of each shared bill)
budget.spentBasisHint: Personal matches each person’s line in the monthly report. Couple counts only rows marked as shared, using the full joint amount.
budget.listHintHousehold: Couple view: only joint (shared-expense) budgets. Spending counts full shared bills only.
budget.listHintSelf: Your view: only your personal budgets. Spending uses your share of shared expenses, like the report.
budget.listHintPartner: Partner view: only their personal budgets. Amounts use their share of shared expenses.
budget.addAsHouseholdCoupleOnly: In couple view, new budgets are always joint budgets (shared expenses only, full amount per shared item).
budget.coupleBudgetSwitchToHousehold: Switch to couple view to see this budget in the list.
budget.coupleBudgetVisibleHouseholdOnly: Joint budgets appear only under couple view.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.budgetExceeded: Budget exceeded! You've spent {{spent}} {{currency}} out of {{amount}} {{currency}}
notifications.budgetWarning: Budget warning: You've used {{percentage}}% of your budget

settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.exchangeRateUrlHelper: URL to fetch currency exchange rates. Should return JSON with USD, GBP, EURO, and ILS rates.

export.title: Export Data
export.pdfGroupedHint: The PDF is grouped by category; the category appears as each section title.

partner.title: Partner & Monthly Settlement
partner.pendingReceived: You have a pending partner request.
partner.noTransferNeeded: No transfer needed for this month.

header.installInstructionsMobile: To install: Tap the browser menu (⋮) and select "Add to Home Screen" or "Install App"
header.installInstructionsSafari: To install: Tap the share button (□↑) and select "Add to Home Screen"
header.installInstructionsDesktop: To install: Click the install icon (⊕) in the address bar or browser menu (⋮) > "Install App"
header.installInstructionsDesktopChrome:
To install on desktop:

1. Look for the install icon (⊕) in the address bar (on the right)
2. Alternatively: Click the browser menu (⋮) > "Install App"

If the icon doesn't appear, make sure:
- You're using Chrome or Edge
- The site is running on HTTPS
- Service Worker is registered (refresh the page)
header.installInstructionsDesktopSafari: Safari on desktop does not support PWA installation. Please use Chrome or Edge.
header.installInstructionsFirefox: To install: Firefox supports PWA installation. Click the browser menu (☰) > "Install App"
header.installInstructionsGeneric: To install: Use the browser menu to install the app. Chrome and Edge support PWA installation on desktop.
header.installRequiresHTTPS: PWA installation requires a secure connection (HTTPS). Please access the site via HTTPS.

recurring.title: Recurring expenses
recurring.subtitle: These templates add the same expense to your ledger automatically on each due date (for example every month).
recurring.enable: Repeat this expense on a schedule
recurring.empty: No recurring expenses yet. Turn on “Repeat this expense” when adding a transaction.

savingsGoals.title: Savings Goals
savingsGoals.noGoalsYet: No savings goals yet. Add your first goal!
savingsGoals.areYouSureDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
